name: Knee-to-Chest Stretch
description: Lie on your back with both legs flat. Bring one knee up toward your chest and hug it in with both hands, interlocking your fingers just below the knee. Keep your opposite leg flat on the ground and your lower back pressed into the floor. Hold and breathe, feeling the stretch in your lower back and glute. Switch sides. Can also be done with both knees at once for a deeper lower back release.
